message.content:
@startuml
participant "Cache" as Cache #D3D8FF
participant "DiskLruCache" as DiskLruCache #F9EBEA
participant "JournalFile" as JournalFile #FEF5E7
participant "DiskLruCache.Entry" as Entry #FFF0B2
participant "LinkedHashMap" as LinkedHashMap #DAEEA1
participant "Snapshot" as Snapshot #C6EFF4
participant "Cache.Entry" as CEntry #EDBBFC
participant "Response" as Response #FFECEC
participant "CacheResponseBody" as Body #FAECDD

== get() ==
activate DiskLruCache
    activate DiskLruCache : initialize\n--\nread journal file from disk to memory
    
        note right of DiskLruCache 
            读取journal文件，解析成entry对象并放入内存中的linkedhashmap中。如果缓存数据损坏则删除该cache对应的所有磁盘文件和memory entry
            
            
        
    
    
    deactivate DiskLruCache 
    
    ->> +JournalFile: read
    -->+ Entry  
    -->> -DiskLruCache  
    
    put()->>+ LinkedHashSetMap   
    get( )->>- LinkedHashSetMap    
     <--- Entry     
      --->> +Snapshot      
       ...--> -Cache       
response():->>+ CEntry         
   ---->>>Body          
...<<--- Cache         


@enduml
